acceptanceCriteria.summary: TelegramLog now includes optional kind and dedupeKey fields plus a composite lookup index on userId, kind, dedupeKey, and createdAt.
shouldSkipTelegramDelivery checks recent TelegramLog rows for duplicate rerun deliveries.
Existing Telegram send helpers accept optional structured delivery metadata without breaking existing callers.
Existing Telegram send helpers can optionally skip rerun duplicates via policy.skipOnRerun.
Fresh node:test and TypeScript verification commands passed.

notes: Ran npx prisma generate after updating prisma/schema.prisma so local Prisma client types matched the new TelegramLog fields.
